title: berberis calilehua
intro: Berberis calilehua, also known as the Chilean Barberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to the Andes Mountains of South America, characterized by its bright red berries and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve gastrointestinal issues, and act as a natural diuretic. Berberis calilehua has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be made into a poultice or infused oil for topical application.
